name: Xerox Holdings Corp
business: Xerox is a workplace technology company, building and integrating services-led, software-enabled, workplace solutions for enterprises large and small. It serves customers globally in North America, Europe, Latin America, Brazil, Asia Pacific, the Middle East, Africa and India, with five primary offering areas: Workplace Solutions, Production Solutions, Xerox Services, XFS, and IT Solutions.

exposures.sentence: Whether inventing the copier, the Ethernet, the laser printer or more, Xerox has long defined the modern work experience and continues to do so with investments in IT infrastructure, artificial intelligence (AI), Internet of Things (IoT), intelligent document processing (IDP), robotic process automation (RPA) and other technologies that enable Xerox to deliver essential products and services to address the productivity challenges of a hybrid workplace and distributed workforce.

Network and Security Solutions offers network and security solutions encompassing network design and implementation, firewall and VPN deployment, endpoint protection, threat detection and response, vulnerability assessments, and continuous monitoring.
Re-entered the growing mid-volume Production inkjet market through partnerships, with the launch of IJP900 and Proficio products.

catalysts.event: Joint venture with Angelo, Gordon & Co. contributing Xerox trademarks and intellectual property
catalysts.sentence: In February 2026, Xerox Corporation entered into a joint venture arrangement with certain investors including certain funds and accounts managed by Angelo, Gordon & Co., L.P. (collectively, TPG), under which Xerox Corporation contributed certain intellectual property and related assets, including the trademarks in respect of the Xerox brand.

catalysts.event: Expected run rate synergies from Lexmark integration
catalysts.sentence: As we integrate Lexmark, we aim to take a best-in breed approach and offer the best of both companies to our clients, while generating more than $300 million of expected run rate synergies by the end of 2027.
